user_prompt: Generate cookie consent banner copy that complies with both GDPR and ePrivacy.
actual_output:
# GDPR & ePrivacy-Compliant Cookie Consent Banner

## Banner Copy (Primary Consent Layer)

---

### **Headline**
**We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience**

### **Body Text**
We and our partners use cookies, web beacons, and similar tracking technologies to:
- **Essential:** Keep our site secure and functional
- **Analytics:** Understand how you use our site to improve performance
- **Marketing:** Show you relevant content and measure campaign effectiveness
- **Personalization:** Remember your preferences and settings

Some of these technologies involve transferring data outside the EU/EEA. We use Standard Contractual Clauses and other safeguards to protect your data.

**You have full control.** You can accept all, reject non-essential categories, or customize your preferences below.

---

## Consent Categories (Granular Controls)

### **1. Essential Cookies** ✓ *Always On*
**Legal basis:** Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) + ePrivacy necessity exemption

*Required for site functionality, security, and fraud prevention. Cannot be disabled.*

---

### **2. Analytics Cookies** ☐ *Opt-In*
**Legal basis:** Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)

*Helps us measure site traffic, user behavior, and performance. Data is anonymized where possible.*

**Processors:** Google Analytics, Hotjar
- [View Google Analytics DPA](#)
- [View Hotjar DPA](#)

---

### **3. Marketing & Advertising Cookies** ☐ *Opt-In*
**Legal basis:** Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)

*Enables retargeting ads and measures campaign ROI. Your data may be shared with advertising partners.*

**Processors:** Facebook Pixel, LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads
- [View processor list & DPAs](#)

---

### **4. Personalization Cookies** ☐ *Opt-In*
**Legal basis:** Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)

*Remembers your language, region, and content preferences for a customized experience.*

---

## Button Layout (Required by GDPR & ePrivacy)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [Reject All]  [Customize]  [Accept All]        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Critical compliance notes:**
- **"Reject All" must be as easy as "Accept All"** — same button size, color prominence, and click distance (Art. 7(4) GDPR + ePrivacy Directive)
- **"Customize" must be immediately visible** — users cannot be forced to choose between binary accept/reject
- **No dark patterns** — do not use misleading colors, pre-checked boxes, or buried rejection options

---

## Privacy Policy Link (Required)

**Below the banner:**
> For detailed information about how we use cookies and your rights, see our [full Privacy Policy](#) and [Cookie Policy](#).

---

## Full Privacy Policy Section (Linked from Banner)

### **Cookies & Tracking Technologies**

**What are cookies?**
Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We also use similar technologies like web beacons, pixels, and local storage.

**Types of cookies we use:**

| Category | Purpose | Retention | Processors |
|----------|---------|-----------|-----------|
| **Essential** | Site security, fraud prevention, session management | Session or 12 months | [Your company] |
| **Analytics** | Measure traffic, user behavior, site performance | 26 months | Google Analytics, Hotjar |
| **Marketing** | Retargeting, campaign measurement, audience insights | 13 months | Facebook, LinkedIn, Google |
| **Personalization** | Language, region, content preferences | 12 months | [Your company] |

**Your rights:**
- **Right to withdraw consent:** You can change your cookie preferences at any time via the [Cookie Settings](#) link in the footer
- **Right to access:** Request a list of all cookies stored on your device
- **Right to delete:** Clear cookies from your browser settings (note: this may affect site functionality)
- **Right to lodge a complaint:** Contact your supervisory authority if you believe we've violated your privacy rights

**Data transfers outside the EU/EEA:**
Some processors are located in the US or other countries. We rely on:
- Standard Contractual Clauses (Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR)
- Adequacy decisions (where applicable)
- Your explicit consent for transfers to countries without adequate protection

---

## Cookie Settings Page (Persistent Preference Center)

**Accessible via footer link or banner "Customize" button**

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ COOKIE PREFERENCES                                      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                         │
│ ☑ Essential Cookies (Always enabled)                   │
│   Required for site security and functionality          │
│                                                         │
│ ☐ Analytics Cookies                                    │
│   [Learn more] [View processors]                       │
│                                                         │
│ ☐ Marketing Cookies                                    │
│   [Learn more] [View processors]                       │
│                                                         │
│ ☐ Personalization Cookies                              │
│   [Learn more] [View processors]                       │
│                                                         │
│ [Save Preferences]  [Reject All]  [Accept All]         │
│                                                         │
│ Your preferences are saved for 12 months.              │
│ [Clear all cookies]                                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## Compliance Checklist

### **GDPR Requirements (Art. 6, 7, 13, 14)**
- ✅ Granular consent per category (not bundled)
- ✅ Affirmative action required (pre-checked boxes prohibited)
- ✅ Easy withdrawal mechanism
- ✅ Lawful basis clearly stated for each category
- ✅ Processor names and DPA links disclosed
- ✅ Privacy policy linked and accessible

### **ePrivacy Directive Requirements**
- ✅ Prior consent for non-essential cookies (before placement)
- ✅ Clear information about cookie purpose and retention
- ✅ Reject option as prominent as accept
- ✅ No dark patterns or forced consent
- ✅ Right to withdraw consent at any time

### **Technical Implementation**
- ✅ Consent stored in secure, tamper-proof cookie or local storage
- ✅ Consent timestamp recorded (Art. 7(1) GDPR)
- ✅ Non-essential scripts blocked until consent received
- ✅ Consent preference honored across all pages/subdomains
- ✅ Consent valid for 12 months (refresh required after expiry)

---

## Common Pitfalls to Avoid

| ❌ Non-Compliant | ✅ Compliant |
|------------------|------------|
| Pre-checked consent boxes | Unchecked boxes requiring affirmative action |
| "Accept All" button larger/more prominent than "Reject All" | Equal button sizing and prominence |
| Bundled consent ("Accept all cookies") | Granular consent per category |
| No easy withdrawal mechanism | Persistent preference center in footer |
| Vague processor names ("third parties") | Named processors with DPA links |
| Consent stored without timestamp | Timestamped consent records |
| Consent valid indefinitely | Consent expires after 12 months |
| Analytics/marketing enabled by default | Only essential cookies enabled by default |

---

## Implementation Notes

**Timing:** Banner must appear **before** non-essential cookies are placed (Art. 7(4) GDPR + ePrivacy Directive).

**Scope:** This banner applies to **all EU/EEA visitors**. If you serve other regions (US, UK, etc.), you may need region-specific variants:
- **UK:** PECR (similar to ePrivacy) + UK GDPR
- **US:** State privacy laws (CCPA, VCCPA, etc.) — different consent model
- **California:** Opt-out model for some categories

**Legal review:** Have qualified legal counsel in your jurisdiction review this copy before deployment. Supervisory authority guidance varies by country.

---
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully complied with the user's request by providing detailed, compliant cookie banner copy and explaining the regulatory requirements behind it.
